title: Build and Test an MCP Server with Official SDKs · Skill Brief: Schema Validation
summary: Implement a typed server with tools, resources, and automated protocol tests. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext schema validation increment in a runnable tested MCP server. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate structured inputs and return typed content or structured errors.
Create server metadata, capabilities, handlers, and transport entry points.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
